steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which sentence best emphasizes a similarity between The Three Passions and Désirée. The shared feature is that both films star Merle Oberon.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'both films include Merle Oberon': Uses 'both' and names the shared feature directly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'whereas' construction: Contrast language highlights a difference, not a similarity. ✗
  • Choice C — 'however' construction: Same problem — signals contrast rather than similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — mentions only one film: Cannot emphasize a similarity when only one film is discussed. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
